source_text:
友邦保險在亞洲歷史悠久，源遠流長，經歷各種社會動盪和不明朗時期仍能妥善管理業務，因而贏得卓著的
聲譽，體現友邦保險誠可信賴、強韌穩健，並堅持為持分者做對的事。自2020年初以來，2019冠狀病毒病大流
行導致營商環境不斷變化及日趨複雜，而政治、宏觀經濟及資本市場亦出現前所未見的轉移。在這樣的環境下，
友邦保險的財務實力，以及「幫助大眾活出健康、長久、好生活」的目標，更具重大意義。本人衷心感謝友邦
保險所有員工、代理和合作夥伴，即使面對最嚴峻的挑戰，他們仍關懷社區，克盡己職，專心致志地為客戶、
其家庭以及我們的社區提供支援。

initial_translation: AIA has a long and storied history in Asia. Having navigated various social upheavals and periods of uncertainty while managing our business prudently, we have earned a distinguished reputation that reflects our trustworthiness, resilience and steadfast commitment to doing the right thing for our stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has created a constantly evolving and increasingly complex business environment, with unprecedented shifts in the political, macroeconomic and capital markets landscape. In such circumstances, AIA's financial strength and our purpose of helping people live healthier, longer, better lives take on even greater significance. I am deeply grateful to all our employees, agents and partners at AIA who, despite facing the most severe challenges, have continued to care for our communities, fulfilled their responsibilities with dedication, and remained focused on providing support to our customers, their families and our communities.

財務報表

團為此廣泛採取多項措拖，包括財政支持、提供醫療物資、免費保障覆蓋、獲取醫療保健資源、精簡服務流程和

The Group has implemented a wide range of measures for this purpose, including financial support, provision of medical supplies, complimentary coverage, access to healthcare resources, streamlined service processes and accelerated claims payments, of which I am proud. We have, as always, identified every possible reason to make a claim payment, and have paid out over US$16 billion in insurance benefits and claims during the year, providing our customers with critically important financial protection.

source_text:
儘管為遏制2019冠狀病毒病傳播的措施導致新業務價值減少至27.65億美元，但隨著外出限制放寬，銷售動力轉
趨正面，並在2021年展開非常強勁的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值按年增長15%。我們規模龐大和持續增長的有
效保單組合所帶來的高質素和經常性收入來源，帶動2020年稅後營運溢利增加5%，期內產生的基本自由盈餘則
增長7%。截至2020年12月31日，內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%，足
證我們雄厚的資本實力和嚴謹的財務管理。

initial_translation: Despite measures to contain the spread of COVID-19 resulting in VONB declining to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as mobility restrictions eased, and we entered 2021 with exceptionally strong momentum, with VONB in the first two months growing 15% year-on-year. Our large and growing portfolio of in-force policies, which generates high-quality and recurring income streams, drove a 5% increase in OPAT in 2020, while UFSG generated during the period grew 7%. As at 31 December 2020, EV Equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion, with the Group LCSM cover ratio at 374%, demonstrating our strong capital position and prudent financial management.
compact_translation: Despite COVID-19 containment measures reducing VONB to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as mobility restrictions eased, entering 2021 with exceptionally strong momentum, with VONB in the first two months growing 15% year-on-year. Our large and growing in-force policy portfolio generated high-quality recurring income, driving 5% OPAT growth in 2020, while UFSG grew 7%. As at 31 December 2020, EV Equity reached US$67.2 billion, with Group LCSM cover ratio at 374%, demonstrating strong capital position and prudent financial management.

As at 31 December 2020, EV Equity reached US$67.2 billion, with Group LCSM cover ratio at 374%, demonstrating strong capital position and prudent financial management.

source_text:
友邦保險具有多項顯著優勢，讓我們在競爭激烈的市場別樹一幟。我們在亞洲經營數十載，擁有區內無可比擬的
平台，並於我們業務所在的大部分市場雄踞領導地位。我們始終如一地百分百專注於亞洲市場，有助我們在全球
最具吸引力的壽險業地區全面把握增長機遇。這份專注結合我們領導團隊在亞洲的豐富經驗及員工的優秀質素，
一直是我們表現卓越的重要動力。

initial_translation: AIA possesses multiple distinctive advantages that set us apart in a highly competitive market. With decades of operations across Asia, we have an unparalleled platform in the region and hold leading positions in most of the markets where we conduct business. Our unwavering and complete focus on the Asian market enables us to fully capitalize on growth opportunities in the world's most attractive life insurance regions. This focus, combined with the extensive Asian experience of our leadership team and the exceptional quality of our workforce, has been a key driver of our outstanding performance.

儘管2020年是前所未見的一年，但我對亞洲壽險行業的前景和友邦保險的未來比以往更為樂觀。我們繼續挑戰自
己，發展我們的優先任務，以確保我們能繼續適切地迎合客戶期望和財務需求的轉變。我們的全新企業策略建基
於友邦保險的現有實力，推進轉型過程，以在未來為客戶提供最佳的服務。

initial_translation: Despite 2020 being an unprecedented year, I am more optimistic than ever about the prospects for the life insurance industry in Asia and the future of AIA. We continue to challenge ourselves and develop our priorities to ensure we can continue to appropriately meet the evolving expectations and financial needs of our customers. Our new corporate strategy builds on AIA's existing strengths and advances our transformation process to deliver the best service to our customers in the future.

initial_translation: The pandemic's principal impact on our 2020 financial performance was on new business sales, as containment measures across our numerous markets restricted face-to-face sales activities, particularly in the first half of 2020. Despite new business value of US$2.765 billion in 2020 representing a 33% decrease compared to 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA China contributed the most to the Group's new business value in 2020 and was also our first reporting segment to demonstrate a recovery in sales momentum, as that region progressively eased strict lockdown measures from March 2020 onwards.
compact_translation: The pandemic's principal impact on our 2020 financial performance was on new business sales, as containment measures across our markets restricted face-to-face sales activities, particularly in H1 2020. Despite new business value of US$2.765 billion in 2020 representing a 33% decrease versus 2019, we rapidly adopted digital tools, and widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported sales momentum recovery. AIA China contributed most to the Group's new business value in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to demonstrate sales momentum recovery, as that region progressively eased lockdown measures from March 2020 onwards.

source_text:
我們的高質素、經常性盈利來源以及對有效保單組合的積極管理，帶動稅後營運溢利增長了5%至59.42億美元，
並使營運溢利率穩定在16.9%。所收取的續保保費增加了10%，經常性保費總額佔2020年所收取保費的90%以
上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投
資回報減少的影響。一如預期，上半年所述的異常正面醫療理賠經驗並未在下半年再次發生，但我們繼續看到此
來源對稅後營運溢利增長的正面貢獻。在友邦保險泰國業務的失效經驗恢復正常的情況下，下半年的續保率有所
改善，而本集團的續保率為95%。

initial_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion, while maintaining a stable operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums collected increased by 10%, with recurring premiums representing 90% or more of total premiums collected in 2020. OPAT growth benefited from significantly favorable claims experience throughout the year, which offset the impact of lower yields on new fixed income investments and the assumption of reduced long-term equity investment returns. As expected, the exceptional favorable medical claims experience reported in the first half did not recur in the second half, but we continued to see positive contributions from this source to OPAT growth. With AIA's Thailand business lapse experience normalizing, persistency improved in the second half, with the Group's persistency rate at 95%.
compact_translation: Our high-quality, recurring earnings sources and active management of our in-force portfolio drove OPAT growth of 5% to US$5.942 billion, maintaining an operating margin of 16.9%. Renewal premiums collected increased 10%, with recurring premiums representing 90% or more of 2020 total premiums. OPAT growth benefited from significantly favorable claims experience throughout the year, offsetting lower yields on new fixed income investments and reduced long-term equity investment return assumptions. As expected, the exceptional favorable medical claims experience in the first half did not recur in the second half, though positive contributions from this source continued. With AIA's Thailand business lapse experience normalizing, persistency improved in the second half, with Group persistency at 95%.

source_text:
董事會建議末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙，並須於本公司應屆股東週年大會上獲股東批准。這使2020年的
全年股息總額為每股135.30港仙，較2019年的全年股息總額上升6.9%。這是秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持
續及漸進的派息政策，讓集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。

initial_translation: The Board recommends an increase in the final dividend of 7.5% to 100.30 Hong Kong cents per share, subject to approval by shareholders at the forthcoming Annual General Meeting of the Company. This brings the total dividend per share for 2020 to 135.30 Hong Kong cents per share, representing an increase of 6.9% compared to the total dividend per share for 2019. This is in line with AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, which enables the Group to capitalize on future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.
compact_translation: The Board recommends a 7.5% increase in final dividend to 100.30 Hong Kong cents per share, subject to shareholder approval at the forthcoming Annual General Meeting. This reflects AIA's long-established prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, enabling the Group to capitalize on future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.

source_text:
儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普
遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個
顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內
地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業
務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同期高出15%。

initial_translation: Despite VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 declining by 33% compared to 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported the recovery of sales momentum. AIA China contributed the largest share to the Group's VONB in 2020 and was our first reporting segment to demonstrate recovery in sales momentum, as the region gradually eased strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards. Excluding the subdued sales from mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong, the Group's other segments showed strong recovery in VONB in the second half, growing 23% compared to the first half. The Group's new business development momentum remained robust in 2021, with VONB in the first two months up 15% compared to the same period in 2020.
compact_translation: Despite VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 declining 33% from 2019, rapid adoption of digital tools and widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported sales momentum recovery. AIA China contributed the largest share to Group VONB in 2020 and was the first reporting segment demonstrating recovery, as the region eased lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding subdued mainland Chinese visitor sales to Hong Kong, other segments showed strong VONB recovery in H2, up 23% versus H1. Group new business momentum remained robust in 2021, with H1 VONB up 15% year-on-year.
final_translation: Despite VONB of US$2,765 million in 2020 declining 33% from 2019, rapid adoption of digital tools and widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported sales momentum recovery. AIA China contributed the largest share to Group VONB in 2020 and was the first reporting segment demonstrating recovery, as the region eased lockdowns from March 2020. Excluding subdued mainland Chinese visitor sales to Hong Kong, other segments showed strong VONB recovery in H2, up 23% versus H1. Group new business momentum remained robust in 2021, with H1 VONB up 15% year-on-year.

source_text:
友邦保險中國業務在2021年錄得成功的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值與2020年同期比較，錄得非常強勁的增
長。2020年新業務價值9.68億美元較2019年減少17%，主要由於2019冠狀病毒病在第一季爆發初期而導致銷售額
有限。隨著外出限制放寬，新業務動力得以迅速改善。新業務價值重拾我們慣常的季節性規律，比重更側重於上
半年。在2020年，友邦保險中國業務為集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻。

initial_translation: AIA China achieved strong momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months recording very robust growth compared to the same period in 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased by 17% compared to 2019, primarily due to limited sales in the early stages of the COVID-19 outbreak in the first quarter. As travel restrictions were relaxed, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed our customary seasonal pattern, with a greater proportion weighted towards the first half of the year. In 2020, AIA China contributed the largest share to the Group's VONB.
compact_translation: AIA China achieved strong momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months recording very robust growth versus 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased 17% from 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the early COVID-19 outbreak in Q1. As travel restrictions eased, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed customary seasonal patterns, weighted toward H1. In 2020, AIA China contributed the largest share to Group VONB.
final_translation: AIA China achieved strong momentum in 2021, with VONB in the first two months recording very robust growth versus 2020. VONB of US$968 million in 2020 decreased 17% from 2019, primarily due to limited sales during the early COVID-19 outbreak in Q1. As travel restrictions eased, new business momentum improved rapidly. VONB resumed customary seasonal patterns, weighted toward H1. In 2020, AIA China contributed the largest share to Group VONB.

source_text:
在實施旅遊限制後，友邦保險香港業務來自中國內地訪港客戶的新業務銷售自2020年2月初起實際上已暫停，導
致其新業務價值大幅下降。新業務價值利潤率錄得跌幅，反映新業務量減少導致承保開支超支、產品組合變動及
利率下降的影響所致。澳門在2020年9月底恢復中國內地旅客個人遊計劃。這為澳門的中國內地訪澳客戶銷售回
升提供支持，使其在第四季佔友邦保險澳門分公司的年化新保費總額超過三分之一。

initial_translation: Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong were effectively suspended from early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in VONB. The VONB margin recorded a decrease, reflecting the impact of reduced new business volume leading to underwriting expense overruns, changes in product mix, and the effect of lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland Chinese visitors at the end of September 2020. This provided support for the recovery in sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of the ANP total for AIA Macau in the fourth quarter.
compact_translation: Following travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong were effectively suspended from early February 2020, causing significant VONB decline. VONB margin decreased due to reduced new business volume, underwriting expense overruns, product mix changes, and lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland Chinese visitors at end-September 2020, supporting sales recovery from Mainland Chinese visitors, which exceeded one-third of ANP total for AIA Macau in Q4.
final_translation: Following travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland Chinese visitors to AIA Hong Kong were effectively suspended from early February 2020, causing significant VONB decline. VONB margin decreased due to reduced new business volume, underwriting expense overruns, product mix changes, and lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland Chinese visitors at end-September 2020, supporting sales recovery from Mainland Chinese visitors, which exceeded one-third of ANP total for AIA Macau in Q4.
